title: NOAA Marine Debris
description: A NOAA source card about marine debris, pollution, ecosystems, and prevention.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA Marine Debris resources explain how trash and lost materials enter waterways and oceans, affect wildlife and communities, and can be prevented or removed.
Use this source for environmental nonfiction that connects local choices, systems, evidence, and solutions.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
